iC2 Clients

Advice CRM Workspace

A focused home for client records, letters, file notes, and adviser administration.

DashboardRecent work, activity, and shortcuts.ClientsSearch, create, and manage client records.LettersGenerate client letters and advice outputs.AdminManage users, licensees, and practices.My ProfileManage your account and personal settings.

Adviser Workspace

Initial shell for advisers, paraplanners, and support staff with role-aware access to follow.

Administration

This area will support the operational hierarchy behind the app: users, licensees, practices, and access management.

Users and roles

Administration staff need a safe place to manage users, assign roles, and update access without touching production data directly.

Hierarchy management

Licensees and practices already exist in the API, so the admin area can map directly to those entities while still feeling cleaner than a raw CRUD screen.

Operational settings

This is also the natural place for profile-level settings, prompts, document templates, and future system configuration.
